name: create_site
description: Create a new Netlify site. Optionally link it to a Git repository for continuous deployment, configure a custom domain, and set build commands. The site gets a free .netlify.app subdomain automatically.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Subdomain name for the site (e.g., 'my-blog' creates my-blog.netlify.app). If omitted, a random name is generated.

parameters.name: custom_domain
parameters.description: Custom domain to assign (e.g., 'blog.mysite.com'). DNS must be configured separately.

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: Git repository configuration with 'provider' (github/gitlab/bitbucket), 'id' (repo ID), 'repo' (org/repo), 'branch', 'cmd' (build command), and 'dir' (publish directory).

parameters.name: build_settings
parameters.description: Build configuration with 'cmd' (build command), 'dir' (publish directory), and 'env' (environment variables object).
